THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TUCKER, MICHELE MARTINEZ, GUADALUPE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1221 POTRERO AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94110 $3,245.00 RENT, $3,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $389.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,634.00, LEASE FORFEITED, ($41.57 PER DAY)
